expectations.text: Flags callbacks invoked under lock risking deadlocks
expectations.evidence: Findings #1, #2, and #3 all detail callbacks under lock with specific fix suggestions. This is the strongest finding and matches exactly what human reviewers flagged.

expectations.text: Notes rcState.subscribed not resetting on tracer restart
expectations.evidence: The 'What looks good' section actually praises the restart detection as correct, saying it 'handles the tracer restart case correctly'. Human reviewers disagreed.

expectations.text: Flags use of internal.BoolEnv instead of internal/env package
expectations.evidence: The 'What looks good' section incorrectly states internal.BoolEnv 'goes through the proper internal/env channel'. This is a false positive — internal.BoolEnv is a direct os.Getenv wrapper.

expectations.text: Flags test helpers in non-test files (production builds)
expectations.evidence: Finding #4 explicitly flags ResetForTest et al in testing.go as exported test helpers that ship in production

expectations.text: Notes duplicate constant definition across packages

expectations.evidence: Not mentioned — the diff may not include the goleak change in what was fetched
